pr.title: Record: 11L XSA4 + Multi-Pass Streaming Score-First Legal TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.0523)

output.summary: Adds multi-pass streaming score-first legal TTT with per-token min-NLL ensembling plus a rotary cache fix on the 11L XSA stack’s quantized backbone.
techniques: Multi-pass score-first TTT with shifted trajectories and per-token min NLL
Rotary cache clone fix to allow backprop through partial RoPE
Quantized 11L XSA4 backbone with GPTQ-lite int6 + EMA/SWA/TTT stack
